title: 11 Herbal Creams for Smokers with Hypertension
description: Centella asiatica creams have gained attention for their potential benefits in managing hypertension. The herb, also known as gotu kola, contains properties like triterpenoid saponins and flavonoids that may help improve blood vessel function and reduce inflammation. These compounds can relax and dilate blood vessels, allowing for better blood flow and lowering blood pressure. Additionally, Centella asiatica has antioxidant properties that can protect against oxidative stress and cell ...
